titleStmt.title: SII 8.511: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 511. (A.R. No. 212 of 1903). ON THE WEST BASE OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat tannirukaḻal malaraṭi maṉṉavar cūṭac ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟu naṭappa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅkam miriya kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅko ḷāḻi
varai yāḻi tiriya Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa cempoṉ viraciṅkācaṉattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa cakkaravatti śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu perumpā
ṇappāṭi tiruveṅkaṭakkoṭṭattu cilaināṭṭu tiruviṟpiṟampeṭṭu ma hā- de var paracurāmicuramuṭaiyārkku nāraṇatevan puṭolaraicanāṉa vikkiramacoḻak karuppāṟuṭaiyānen Ittevar tevatāṉamāṉa cilaiyūryāḷuṭaiya maṉṉiyamum En parikkirattiṟ maṉavattiyum cilaiyūrnāṭṭil puñcai nañcaippaṭṭi pattu vaṭṭiyum Ittevar tiruṉāḷeḻunta tiruppaṭimāṟṟu
yeppeṟpaṭṭatum Eṅkaḷ tamappanār nāraṇatevanāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻak karuppāṟuṭaiyāṟkku naṉṟāka veṉṟu Ittirukkaṟṟaḷi Eṭuppittu Oru tirununtāviḷakkum vaittu mantirappoṉakam nānāḻi Ariciyum kaṟiamutu Iraṇṭum neyyamutu Āḻākkum tirumeyppūccu Araip palamum puḻuku ney yaraikkālum tiruccāntu Eḻu kaḻañcum kaṟpūraṅ kālum tiruṉāḷppaṭikkut tiruccāntu cātta
Aṭaikkāyamutum Ilaiyamutum celvatākavum Ippaṭi cilā(l)lekai paṇṇikkuṭutten nāraṇatevan puṭolaraicanāṉa vikkiramacoḻak karuppāṟuṭaiyānen . Ittanmam Irakṣippāṉ śrīpātam En talaimeliṉa . Ittanmam virotam
niṉaippāṉ ge ṅkaikkaraiyil kurāṟpacuk koṉṟāṉ pāvattup paṭuvāṉ . Ivai coḻapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivarkaḷ collak kalveṭṭineṉ puḷiyaṉ tiruvakattiyāṉa tevapurāṇap peruṅkarumāneṉ . Itu śrī
māyeśva rar Irakṣai . naṉṟāka śrī .
Digital edition of SII 8.511 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
